title: leontodon hirtus var. arenarius
intro: Leontodon hirtus var. arenarius is a rare variety of the dandelion plant, characterized by its hairy leaves and a unique adaptation to coastal environments. Traditionally, Leontodon hirtus var. arenarius has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as supporting liver function, reducing blood pressure, and aiding in the treatment of urinary tract infections. In herbal preparations, Leontodon hirtus var. arenarius can be consumed as a tea, used in tinctures, or added to salves and creams for topical applications.
